cpscraper.scraper package

Submodules

cpscraper.scraper.scraper module

This module provides the Scraper model-controller.

class cpscraper.scraper.scraper.Scraper(target_folder_path, save_html=True, max_level=3, classifier=<function Scraper.<lambda>>, verify_ssl=False, concurrency_companies=1000, threads_bs4=10, threads_download=1000, use_sqlite=False)[source]

Bases: object

scrape_companies(urls)[source]

Create initial asynchronous task to fetch all urls

Parameters:

urls – List of all level 0 urls to visit

test_package()[source]
cpscraper.scraper.scraper.get_urls(r, url)[source]

Parse code and return content and urls. Defined it here to be able to pickle it and process it in a thread pool.
